name: Quick Craft
description: Client-side handbook crafting helper for Vintage Story 1.22.2. Adds inline handbook recipe actions: + fills one craft, * fills the maximum possible batch and immediately shift-crafts it into your inventory, ALL repeats max-batch crafting until materials run out. Automatically checks same-output recipe variants, keeps shaped recipe slots aligned correctly, and sends synchronized inventory packets so auto-craft works immediately without closing menus.
